channel.title: GitHub Batchfile Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Batchfile in GitHub

item.title: PaperMC/Folia
item.description: Fork of Paper which adds regionised multithreading to the dedicated server.

item.title: Alex313031/Thorium-Win
item.description: Chromium fork for Windows named after radioactive element No. 90; Windows builds of https://github.com/Alex313031/Thorium

item.title: AveYo/MediaCreationTool.bat
item.description: Universal MCT wrapper script for all Windows 10/11 versions from 1507 to 21H2!

item.title: enhorse/java-interview
item.description: Вопросы и ответы к интервью Java разработчика

item.title: kellwinr/galaxybook_mask
item.description: This script will allow you to mimic your windows pc as a Galaxy Book laptop, this is usually used to bypass Samsung Notes

item.title: ionuttbara/windows-defender-remover
item.description: A tool which is uses to remove Windows Defender in Windows 8.x, Windows 10 (every version) and Windows 11.

item.title: realpython/python-guide
item.description: Python best practices guidebook, written for humans.
